summary.headline: fellows_local_db is deterministically attested conformant to PNA Spec 0.1 for its declared flavor: 23 conformant, 2 not-applicable, 0 non-conformant across 25 evaluated ACs. 3 AC(s) carry self-attested partial-conformance flagged for human review (AC-16, AC-PRM-A, AC-MCP-A); the EX-CLOUD-LLM exception and the CST-PWA-* platform constraints are handled honestly and folded into the AC findings they bear on. Derived from docs/Architecture.md by scripts/evaluate_report.py — not an LLM audit.

Static existence + marker-state only — pass/fail is enforced by the suite (`just test`).

Static existence + marker-state only — pass/fail is enforced by the suite (`just test`).
docs/Architecture.md also declares a non-test verification kind for this row (human-review / code inspection / by construction / by bounding).

Bears on constraint CST-PWA-PRIVATE-SNAPSHOT (**conformant** (as a *handling*): the capability reduction is complete — UI/route reduction **plus** data-layer refusal of off-folder durable writes (worker-side load-bearing + page-side defense-in-depth, PR #244 `d2706a9`, extended in PR #261 to the restore/email-import path with a raw-RPC no-bypass proof; [`../plans/private_data_enforcement.md`](../plans/private_data_enforcement.md)). The negative invariant is now a hard guard, not a strict-xfail. Frontier stays **Open**: this is honest handling, not a durable cross-platform store.); declared and handled in docs/Architecture.md § Constraint attestation, folded here per the toolkit schema rule that EX-*/CST-* live as references inside the AC findings they bear on.

Bears on constraint CST-PWA-STORAGE-EVICTABLE (**conformant** (as a handling): settings/prefs are localStorage-only off-folder (`test_off_folder_settings_are_empty`, a hard guard; #248 closed the identity-metadata residual). The relationships residual — rows hydrated into OPFS during a folder session linger after the handle drops — is **mitigated, not avoided**: the migration banner surfaces it for the user to move onto disk, and acting on the prompt completes the OPFS→folder migration (`test_stranded_opfs_groups_fire_migration_prompt`, `test_stranded_opfs_groups_migrate_into_freshly_picked_folder`). The earlier "Avoided … in its strongest reading" was an over-claim for the post-folder-lapse path, corrected here (Framing A). A future stronger handling could clear the OPFS buffer *after* a verified migration — never before.); declared and handled in docs/Architecture.md § Constraint attestation, folded here per the toolkit schema rule that EX-*/CST-* live as references inside the AC findings they bear on.

Bears on constraint CST-PWA-NO-SYNC (conformant: canonical-copy disambiguation shipped (durably on disk, verified byte-level); sync explicitly out of scope); declared and handled in docs/Architecture.md § Constraint attestation, folded here per the toolkit schema rule that EX-*/CST-* live as references inside the AC findings they bear on.

Bears on constraint CST-PWA-NO-BACKGROUND (conformant: opportunistic-only, honestly framed); declared and handled in docs/Architecture.md § Constraint attestation, folded here per the toolkit schema rule that EX-*/CST-* live as references inside the AC findings they bear on.
